overall.description: First-person game engine footage walking through a dark concrete utility tunnel with a burning vehicle ahead, exiting into a desert landscape at golden hour with wet paved roads, passing a stationary car, and continuing toward a distant checkpoint structure with the Night City skyline visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete utility tunnel with railway tracks

events.description: approaching a burning vehicle with smoke and debris blocking the tunnel ahead
bright daylight becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dark tunnel toward the explosion and exit

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls lining both sides of the underground passage
railway tracks embedded in the tunnel floor running straight ahead
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the curved tunnel ceiling
wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames with thick smoke rising

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow concrete tunnel with metal tracks on the floor and fluorescent ceiling lights. Ahead, a burning vehicle creates a smoky obstruction, while bright daylight becomes visible at the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road at sunset with distant cyberpunk city skyline

events.description: exits the dark tunnel into bright desert landscape with golden hour lighting
passing a stationary yellow station wagon parked beside the tunnel exit

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet reflective desert road toward a distant concrete checkpoint structure

notable_agents.action: yellow station wagon parked stationary beside the tunnel exit

entered.detail: wet paved road surface reflecting the golden sunset light
spiky desert trees scattered along the roadside
tall saguaro cacti dotting the desert landscape
futuristic skyscrapers of Night City visible on the horizon
multi-level concrete building with antennas ahead on the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a vast desert landscape bathed in golden hour light, the camera passes a parked yellow car and continues along a wet reflective road. Joshua trees and saguaro cacti line the path while a distant concrete checkpoint structure and the Night City skyline dominate the horizon ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive confines of a dark utility tunnel into a vast, sun-drenched desert expanse. It begins by advancing through a narrow concrete corridor lined with metal tracks and fluorescent lighting, moving toward a burning vehicle that fills the space with smoke. As the camera pushes past the wreckage, the dim interior gives way to a blinding burst of daylight at the tunnel's exit. The scene then opens into a wide landscape bathed in golden hour light, where the camera glides along a wet, reflective road past a parked yellow car and scattered cacti. Finally, the view expands across the arid terrain toward a distant concrete checkpoint and the towering silhouette of the Night City skyline on the horizon.
